name: cosmogonic-quantum-mechalogodrom
description: Tsotchke-powered deterministic A-Life petri cosmos with WebGL2 rendering, 113-system comparative reports, 20-project Tsotchke corpus classifications (~16 wired/harvested, LLM/onchain fenced), Eshkol AD/GWT, Moonlab, QGT, spin, libirrep, quake, ULG, LOGO, tensorcore, PINN/PIMC, RNG, 26 BiologicForms, 25 Archons, 100 faculties (~30 deep-wired), 25 ToM organs, 10 emergence angles, and proxy-only consciousness/sentience labs. Deterministic Rng, not LLM, not a sentience claim.
author: 0thernes Corp <0_0@0thernes.art> (https://0thernes.art)

scripts.prepare: git config core.hooksPath .githooks && git config core.autocrlf input || true
scripts.predev: bun scripts/sync-guard.ts && bun scripts/gen-alife-embed.ts && bun scripts/gen-bible-corpus.ts && bun scripts/build.ts
scripts.build: bun scripts/gen-alife-embed.ts && bun scripts/gen-bible-corpus.ts && bun scripts/gen-consciousness-lab-data.ts && bun scripts/build.ts
scripts.lint: oxlint src server.ts tests bench scripts
scripts.check:static: bun run format:check && bun run typecheck && bun run lint
scripts.check: bun run format:check && bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run verify:receipts && bun run sync:check && bun run verify:facts && bun run build
